design_notes: S0 introduces the core rhythm of the synthwave groove with a comfortable, sparse tapping pattern that alternates outer lanes to build initial player familiarity. S1 represents the track's climatic drop where we suddenly increase density to 1-beat intervals, mapping a driving sequence that flows smoothly into a 2-beat hold on the center lane. S2 winds down the experience during the outro, providing a satisfying resolution with alternating taps that let the energy breathe.
